scope_note: Lojasiewicz Orbit Descent Cert family [103] v2: intrinsic form proved in B3. H-crit is derived from phi_t > 0 + Lojasiewicz + fixed-point propagation — the h_crit_witnessed field of v1 is dropped. Cert requires only phi_t > 0 (orbit not at minimum) beyond smoothness, Lojasiewicz, and orbit feasibility. Gate 2D recomputes C(O) = sum_t 2*mu*eta_eff_t*(1 - beta/2*eta_eff_t) as in v1.
